# setPassword

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

Execute the setPassword mutation

## Usage

```bash
csdk set-password --input.clientMutationId <value> --input.currentPassword <value> --input.newPassword <value>
```

## Examples

### Run setPassword

```bash
csdk set-password --input.clientMutationId <value> --input.currentPassword <value> --input.newPassword <value>
```
